summary: Completed testing of WaMerce 1688 Integration Platform - Iteration 9. All 10 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: Shopify Historical Sync page loads with store selector, sync mode tabs, date inputs. Order Fulfillment Modal shows 1688 account selector when accounts exist. API Monitor page displays usage stats.
critical_code_review_comments: ShopifyHistoricalSync.jsx correctly implements store selector, sync mode tabs (Quick Select, Date Range, Days Back), and date inputs with proper data-testid attributes
OrderFulfillmentModal.jsx correctly fetches 1688 accounts on mount and displays account selector when accounts exist
GET /api/1688-scraper/taobao/product/{product_id} returns product data with title, price, images, and variants
POST /api/1688/create-purchase-order accepts account_id parameter and uses the selected account's access token
GET /api/1688/accounts returns list of authorized 1688 accounts with account_id, account_name, and is_default fields
TMAPI integration is properly configured with token and supports 1688, taobao, and tmall platforms
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing stores and 1688 accounts.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 features fully tested. Shopify Historical Sync page at /shopify-sync works with store selector, sync mode tabs, and date inputs. Order Fulfillment Modal shows 1688 account selector (account 'Delivering to the Five Continents' exists). Taobao product API works with product ID 601502437456. API Monitor page at /tmapi-monitor shows usage stats. Create purchase order endpoint accepts account_id parameter.

features_tested.1_shopify_historical_sync_page: PASS - Page loads at /shopify-sync with store selector, sync mode tabs (Quick Select, Date Range, Days Back), date inputs, and Start Historical Sync button
features_tested.2_1688_account_selector: PASS - OrderFulfillmentModal shows 'Select 1688 Account' dropdown when accounts exist, with account 'Delivering to the Five Continents' available
features_tested.3_taobao_product_api: PASS - GET /api/1688-scraper/taobao/product/601502437456 returns product with title, price ¥288, 5 images, and variants
features_tested.4_api_monitor_page: PASS - Page loads at /tmapi-monitor showing Today's Calls, Success Rate, Est. Points Used, Failed Calls, Product Import Statistics, Usage by Endpoint, and Recent API Calls
features_tested.6_stores_api: PASS - GET /api/stores returns 4 stores (asmia, tnvcollection, tnvcollectionpk, ashmiaa)
features_tested.8_tmapi_status: PASS - GET /api/1688-scraper/tmapi/status shows configured=true with platforms [1688, taobao, tmall]
features_tested.9_product_links_api: PASS - GET /api/1688-scraper/product-links/get-1688 extracts product ID from SKU
features_tested.10_taobao_shop_api: PASS - POST /api/1688-scraper/taobao/shop/products endpoint exists (may return 417 maintenance per TMAPI docs)

api_verification_summary.GET /api/1688/accounts: WORKING - Returns 1 account with account_id, account_name
api_verification_summary.GET /api/1688-scraper/taobao/product/{pr: WORKING - Returns product data from Taobao/Tmall
api_verification_summary.GET /api/1688-scraper/product-links/get-: WORKING - Extracts 1688 product ID from SKU
